title: kick_user handler is commented out - no kick functionality enforced
description: The wired.chat.kick_user message handler (line 588-589) has its implementation commented out. The message is silently accepted but does nothing. This means: (1) users with kick privilege cannot actually kick anyone, and (2) the server accepts the message without returning an error to the client, giving a false sense that the operation succeeded. The protocol spec defines this as a valid message with chat.id, user.id, and disconnect fields.
recommendation: Either implement the kick_user handler properly (checking wired.account.chat.kick_users privilege, protecting chat_id=1 public chat) or return an explicit error indicating the feature is not implemented.
